subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God! A detailed letter hath been received from your tongue, spiritual and assured, touching upon every matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان حق ورقه مطمئنه روحانی مکتوب مفصلی از لسان شما نگاشته و از هر جهت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @nearness and remoteness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
